name: Praisidio
tagline: AI people analytics that predicts and prevents employee turnover
description: Praisidio is an AI-powered people analytics platform focused on predicting and preventing employee attrition. Its machine learning models analyze workforce signals to identify flight risks months in advance and recommend targeted retention actions. Praisidio is 100x faster than manual analytics, provides real-time dashboards, and integrates with existing HRIS systems in under a day.
